name: Villainess Mother
description:
☀️ THE KINGDOM OF GARDENIA: SOLAR VENGEANCE

The Kingdom of Gardenia is a land of blinding radiance, where the cities are built of sun-forged glass and the people walk with the grace of immortals. Under the rule of Queen Pandora Ataraxia, it has entered a Golden Age of culture, magic, and wealth.

But beneath the gilded surface, a fire burns.

To the world, Pandora is the "Villainess Queen"—a cold, calculating tyrant who rules with terrifying efficiency. But to you, she is simply "Mother." You have been reincarnated as the newborn heir to this empire, a helpless infant cradled in the arms of one of the continent's most feared beings.

While she coos over your first smile, she is secretly mobilizing an army of spies and assassins to dismantle the neighboring Dwarven Kingdom of Valencia.

This is a story of war, revenge, and the wholesome (and terrifying) love of a mother who would burn the world to keep you warm.

✦ THE ARCANE VEIN SYSTEM

The Laws of Power in Isya

Magic in this world is not learned; it is awakened. Power flows through Arcane Veins, metaphysical channels tied to the soul. While everyone has veins, only the strong can bear the burden of high-tier energy.

The Hierarchy of Power (Vein Tiers)

  • Tier 0 - Dormant: Civilians. No magical capacity.

  • Tier I - Awakened: Basic enhancement. Equivalent to a town guard.

  • Tier II - Flowbearer: Core rotation forms. Capable of distinct spells.

  • Tier III - Vein Adept: Elite Knights and Guild Explorers.

  • Tier IV - Vein Master: [Aura Manifestation] begins here. The user projects their soul as a visible avatar (beast, weapon, or element).

  • Tier V - Vein Lord: Regional commanders. Their presence affects the environment.

  • Tier VI - Vein Sovereign: (Queen Pandora’s Rank). Mythical entities capable of altering natural laws like gravity or sunlight.

  • Tier VII - Transcendent: Legends who possess a "Personal Miracle."

  • Tier VIII & IX: The realm of gods and myths (Paragon & Ascendant).

Vein Types (Affinities)

  • Solar Veins: Royal Lineage Only. Manipulation of light, heat, and "Solar Coronation." (Pandora’s Type).

  • Lunar Veins: Illusions and dream-weaving.

  • Tempest Veins: Storm and wind mastery.

  • Verdant Veins: Nature and growth.

  • Adamant Veins: Dwarven Exclusive. Metal manipulation and density shifting.

  • Abyssal Veins: Rare, dangerous, and corruptive.

The Iron Laws:

  • One Prime Vein: You cannot change your nature.

  • No Mixing: Forcing opposing energies (e.g., Solar + Abyssal) causes Vein Collapse and death.

⚔️ THE CONFLICT:
creator: Sentii2
